meta.source_description: Image-to-video leaderboard via text-to-video public arena endpoint

models.name: GenFlare 2.0

models.name: Hailuo 02 0616
models.note:
Hailuo 02 0616 is no longer publicly available as it was the previous checkpoint running on the Hailuo 02 endpoint.

Run with prompt enhancement as a strongly recommended setting on the MiniMax Platform API.
